utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each one includes the required details: a description, costs, and relevant specifics. Health coverage includes both physical and mental coverage with explicit monthly costs broken down. Property coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs. Travel coverage specifies the type of travel insurance with costs. Additional services list enhancement services with costs. Total budget includes both monthly and annual cost breakdown. All are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: First, identify each specific plan or service mentioned in the final coverage plan and locate them in the ground-truth ratings data. For health coverage, the plan lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical)' and 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental)', both of which have ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and primary_health_coverage.mental_health respectively. Also, 'Family Therapy Coverage' is listed under health_enhancement_services. For property coverage, 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' is under property_protection.home_content and 'Home Office Protection' is under property_enhancement_services. For travel coverage, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' is under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. In additional services, 'Golf Equipment Coverage' is mentioned, but there is no exact match in the ground-truth ratings. The closest is 'Gaming Equipment Coverage' and others, but golf equipment is not listed, so it is excluded from mapping. The rest of the items in additional services ('Executive liability protection', 'Golf/recreation accident coverage') are not in the ratings list, so they are excluded. The mapping is made only for the items present in the ratings dataset.
